capabilities.name: update-argument-hint
capabilities.description: Updates SKILL.md argument-hint field to include new CLI flags in the correct format

capabilities.name: update-agent-parse-section
capabilities.description: Updates optimizer agent Step 4 (Parse Task Prompt) to document new flag extraction

capabilities.name: update-agent-run-section
capabilities.description: Updates optimizer agent Step 5 (Run Codeflash) command templates to include new flags

capabilities.name: check-hooks-json-path
capabilities.description: Verifies hooks.json has correct structure, command path uses ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}, and timeout is set

capabilities.name: verify-script-permissions
capabilities.description: Checks script is executable with ls -la and fixes with chmod +x if needed

capabilities.name: test-script-manually
capabilities.description: Runs suggest-optimize.sh directly to inspect output, checks HEAD tracker state, and verifies pyproject.toml config

capabilities.name: check-jq-output
capabilities.description: Validates script JSON output format with hookSpecificOutput structure and verifies jq is installed

capabilities.name: bump-version-sync
capabilities.description: Updates version in plugin.json, marketplace.json metadata.version, and marketplace.json plugins[0].version, keeping all three in sync

capabilities.name: create-release-commit-tag
capabilities.description: Creates atomic commit with version bump and git tag matching the version
